overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from under a dark concrete overpass into bright morning sunlight, revealing futuristic architecture including a massive circular stadium and a towering skyscraper with red neon signage. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with industrial smokestacks, steam vents, digital billboards, and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass along the sidewalk, approaching the stairs on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and cap ascending the concrete stairs to the transit station

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating deep shadow over the street with visible support beams
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the NCART transit station
thick cylindrical support columns for the elevated highway structure
illuminated teal and yellow transit sign reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete highway overpass in deep shadow. The NCART station stairs rise on the right with an illuminated sign, while thick support pillars line the left side of the walkway. A pedestrian ascends the stairs ahead as the camera moves forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct morning sunlight
view opens up to reveal the futuristic stadium and industrial skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk as the environment opens up into a sunlit urban area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow and blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the stadium

entered.detail: massive circular glass and steel stadium structure with steam vents and futuristic architecture
tall industrial chimneys emitting white steam into the clear sky
towering modern skyscraper with 04 designation and red neon signage near the top
low industrial structure with red metal roofing and ventilation equipment
dense network of electrical cables and wires crossing above the street
digital advertisement posters mounted on the white concrete wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shadow of the overpass into bright morning sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal a stunning cyberpunk cityscape. The massive glass stadium dominates the center view while industrial smokestacks rise on the left. A towering skyscraper with red neon signage becomes visible as the camera advances along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with dramatic upward view of towering architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the facade of the tall skyscraper and overhead wires

agents.ego_description: looking up at the towering architecture, neon signs, and industrial steam vents while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: industrial exhaust pipe releasing white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward to showcase the towering glass skyscraper with its red neon signage and the 04 designation. Overhead power lines crisscross the blue sky while industrial steam vents release white plumes. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street approaching stadium entrance with active traffic

events.description: camera returns to forward-facing walking view from the upward tilt
red sports car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the stadium entrance alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the multi-lane road
pedestrian in pink jacket and red boots walking ahead toward the stadium

entered.detail: tall modern street light with horizontal orange illuminated bar
large illuminated advertisement screen showing a character portrait
orange and white striped barriers near the stadium entrance

segments.scene_description: Returning to a forward walking view, the camera approaches the massive stadium which now fills the center of the frame. The street becomes busier with pedestrians walking in the same direction and vehicles passing by on the left. Orange street lamps and digital billboards line the route while construction barriers indicate work near the stadium entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of an industrial underpass into the blinding brilliance of a futuristic morning cityscape. It begins by moving through a sheltered concrete corridor beneath a massive highway overpass, passing thick support pillars and the illuminated stairs of an NCART station. As the camera emerges from the darkness into bright sunlight, the view expands to reveal a sprawling urban landscape dominated by industrial smokestacks and a massive glass stadium. The perspective then tilts dramatically upward to emphasize the vertical scale of a towering skyscraper marked with red neon signage and the 04 designation, framed by crisscrossing power lines and plumes of white steam against a blue sky. Finally, the camera returns to a forward gaze, advancing toward the stadium through a bustling street filled with pedestrians, passing vehicles, and glowing digital billboards.
